name: Sansan API
description: Japans leading business-card/CRM platform Sansan — OCR and contact-intelligence APIs used by 9000+ companies.

seo.title: Sansan API — CRM / Lifecycle Automation
seo.meta_description: Sansan API: Japans leading business-card/CRM platform Sansan — OCR and contact-intelligence APIs used by 9000+ companies.

when_to_use: Business card OCR integrated into a CRM via Sansan API
Contact intelligence enrichment for 9000+ Japanese companies
Digitizing offline networking cards into searchable contacts
CRM enrichment with Sansan's verified Japanese contact data
Enterprise address book sync via Sansan contact API

pros: Default business card data platform in Japan
OCR handles Japanese business cards accurately
Contact intelligence APIs for B2B use cases
cons: API docs and support lean Japanese
Cultural reliance on meishi may fade over time
review.verdict: Non-negotiable contact intelligence layer if you sell into Japan; irrelevant elsewhere.
review.best_for: B2B sales orgs with Japanese customer base or offices
review.not_for: Western companies with no JP go-to-market motion

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence
